title: Irresistibly Lazy Irish Mozzarella Casserole
description: A hearty, comforting Irish dish featuring mozzarella, render fat, and gluten-free friendly ingredients, perfect for a lazy Sunday, this casserole is baked to perfection in a tandoor clay pot, giving it a unique nutty flavor and shaggy texture.

ingredients.name: Gluten-free all-purpose flour
ingredients.notes: containing rice flour, potato starch, and tapioca flour

instructions: Preheat the oven to 375 degrees Fahrenheit.
In a large skillet, heat the render fat over medium heat.
Add the diced onion and cook until softened, about 5 minutes.
Add the minced garlic and cook for an additional minute.
In a large bowl, combine the cooked onion and garlic mixture, diced ham, mozzarella cheese, gluten-free flour, dried thyme, salt, and black pepper.
In a separate bowl, whisk together the whole milk and a pinch of salt.
Add the milk mixture to the bowl with the dry ingredients and stir until just combined.
Transfer the mixture to a tandoor clay pot and cover with a lid.
Bake for 35 minutes, then remove the lid and continue baking for an additional 10 minutes, or until the top is golden brown.
